name: bring-back-spawner-blocking
title: Bring Back Spawner Blocking
author: BeraIV
description: Reverts the 2.1 spawner changes that broke walling off nests: removes the acid cloud emitted when a spawner is blocked, and restores the pre-2.1 spawning_radius (10) and spawning_spacing (3), so biters can no longer squeeze through old wall-off patterns.
